text: Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Check the #mod-guide channel for onboarding resources.
Hi @guide_sam! Your application as event helper has been approved. Head to #event-planning to meet the team!
Welcome to the community, @newbie_kim! You're all set as a member. Start by introducing yourself in #general and check out #getting-started for tips!
Welcome @mentor_lina! We're thrilled to have you as a mentor. Check out #mentor-lounge to connect with other mentors and see the list of members looking for guidance.
